\# Security Policy



\## Supported Versions



The latest version of this project is supported with security updates.



| Version | Supported |

| ------- | --------- |

| Alpha   |    Yes    |



\## Reporting a Vulnerability



If you discover a security vulnerability, please do NOT open a public issue.



Instead, report it privately to the project maintainer.



Maintainer: Ray Valiente  



Please include:

\- A description of the vulnerability

\- Steps to reproduce the issue

\- Possible impact



We will review the report and respond as soon as possible.
